PROJECTS 
AI Research Paper Copilot — Production-Grade Multi-Paper RAG System   
2026 
• Built a production-grade GenAI research assistant using Hybrid RAG (BM25 + Dense Retrieval + RRF), 
Qdrant, and Groq Llama 3.1 for citation-grounded research Q&A, literature review generation, and paper 
comparison across multiple academic papers. 
• Engineered advanced retrieval pipeline with semantic search, Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF), section-aware

chunking, metadata-aware retrieval, and source attribution for high-accuracy grounded responses. 
• Developed scalable PDF/arXiv ingestion system with PyMuPDF, sentence-transformers embeddings, SQLite 
metadata indexing, and optimized low-latency deployment using lazy loading and Streamlit caching.
